title: Journey B Stage 3 — Brand Book V0
description: Initial brand strategy document with voice, tone, positioning, and visual identity guidelines

voice.description: Brand voice description (1-2 sentences). How the brand 'sounds' and communicates personality

tone.description: Tone characteristics (professional, casual, friendly, authoritative, etc.)

positioning.description: Brand positioning statement (who we are, who we serve, why we're different)

forbidden_words.description: Words/phrases to avoid in brand communication (can be empty)

required_terminology.description: Key terms/terminology that must be used consistently (can be empty)

primary_colors.description: Primary colors (hex, rgb, or color names)

logo_usage.description: Guidelines on how logo should be used (sizing, spacing, variations)
